headline: Ulta Beauty's Fragrance Leads Growth: Is the Category Still Hot?
summary: Ulta Beauty closes fiscal 2025 on a solid note, as fragrance leads Q4 with double-digit comps, boosted by exclusives, gift sets and better in-stocks.
